summary: Data Engineer with 3+ years of experience building and optimising data pipelines in enterprise environments. Proficient in Python and SQL, with expertise in developing Power BI dashboards and translating complex datasets into actionable insights. Experienced in leading teams and driving data-quality improvements.

experience.title: Data Engineer
points: Engineered and optimised end-to-end ETL pipelines for high-volume financial data (B2B/B2C), reducing workflow runtime by 85%.
Led a 6-member BAU analytics team, overseeing daily operations and ensuring 100% SLA compliance.
Designed Power BI dashboards tracking financial accuracy and processing velocity, enabling Finance stakeholders to identify data issues early.
Served as primary technical point of contact, translating complex data exceptions into actionable business insights.
Supported downstream SAP Commissions applications, acting as subject matter expert on data interpretation and delivery.

experience.title: Programmer Analyst
points: Leveraged advanced SQL to structure and integrate diverse datasets across clinical and financial domains.
Developed and published Power BI dashboards for key stakeholders, improving resource utilisation and decision-making.

experience.title: Graduate Analyst
points: Completed intensive training in SQL, Power BI development, and enterprise data practices.

volunteer.description: Led and trained a team of volunteers on operational procedures and customer service.
Provided personalised support and guidance to first-semester students, assisting with adaptation and personal development.

name: Darrell Chew
title: Data Specialist

projects.name: Finance Tracking Database
projects.description: Personal finance tracking system with automated data ingestion, stock price monitoring, analytics dashboards, and investment tracking.
